Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Real Life Ampthitheater
Selma, TX
Previous Names:
Verizon Wireless Amphitheater (Changed after 2011)
Seating Capacity: 20000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 5
  DMB  (5)

Longest Performance:
09.02.05 - Jimi Thing (18:15)
Venue Picture
Description
Verizon Wireless Amphitheatre in Selma, TX is located just north of San Antonio. It closed in 2007 and was eventually purchased in 2011 by River City Community Church. While it has been used by the church's congregation since that time, it also reopened for concerts in 2019 after renovations.
